payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Hello, Tal'Doreians, and we have an exciting new product that we want to share with you today on Gilmore's Glorious QVC. What you see here is a beautiful Major Arcana Tarot Deck featuring some of the most prominent figures of who's-who in picturesque Tal'Dorei. Painted by the brilliant Lady Ioana Muresan, printed on the finest cardstock parchment with glittering gold foil, imported from the mines of Kraghammer. This is truly a showstopper for any high society soiree. You're not just telling their fortunes, you're bedazzling their future. Now, today we're offering this beautiful purple and gold deluxe edition as well as-- that's it, actually. I wouldn't offer any other than the finest edition at my store. The going market retail price is four platinum or 40 gold pieces or 400 silver pieces or 4,000 copper pieces, but today we are giving you the special Gilmore's Glorious QVC value of-- Sherri, no, we're still filming those. Please, you're getting them all smudgy!" (beep)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The white and pink contrasting with the fur is very confusing to my brain.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (hum "Axel F")

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (singing) No one watching is old enough to know what that thing is. Yeah, a few people do. And thank you. I know. All right, so first and foremost, let me get through our announcements real fast. Let's see. We have very few tickets left for the live show at GenCon, which we're excited for next week, guys; it's going to be a lot of fun. We're excited to meet everybody at GenCon. We have our campaign guide debuting there physically at the booth. We have a panel, we have a bunch of fun stuff coming up, so excited to see you guys out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be so much fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's see. Merch-wise. Laura.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hi!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We have something to show you guys. You just wait. Hey guys, why don't you roll that footage?

All right, so first and foremost, let me get through our announcements real fast. Let's see. We have very few tickets left for the live show at GenCon, which we're excited for next week, guys; it's going to be a lot of fun. We're excited to meet everybody at GenCon. We have our campaign guide debuting there physically at the booth. We have a panel, we have a bunch of fun stuff coming up, so excited to see you guys out there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be so much fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Let's see. Merch-wise. Laura.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hi!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh man.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We have something to show you guys. You just wait. Hey guys, why don't you roll that footage?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "The special Gilmore's Glorious QVC value of 24 gold pieces and 99 copper. That's right! Just two and a half platinum pieces! But that offer only lasts until the disclosed amount of seconds runs out on the timer in the corner. Scry now or come down and visit me, Gilmore, at Gilmore's Glorious Goods in the Abdar's Promenade district of Emon."

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Which is a good thing. But regardless, I would like you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would probably be about there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You were on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had my boots on, so I was up by his face.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so we'll put you there. Oh god. Here you go. Grog was by the smelter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I had been looking at the thing. The big empty pyramid triangle thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you'd be over in this area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like I was with Vex, maybe on the other side. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was on my broom, because I had been hovering looking at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fair enough. So you'd probably be about--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: About there, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I know that I had just poofed the wings out and I think I was inspecting one of the big metal men before it came out of the wall. I don't really remember which.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Most likely one of the ones that was not attended by another member of the party. So we'll say about here. And Scanlan, whereabouts were you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know, near things. Can't really see too well, so put me where-- Let's see. I was at the door when we opened it and then I was beautiful. And now I'm not as beautiful. So put me near the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Near the door? So we'll put you over in this one here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So all of their faces are indented?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, each one of them, as opposed to the other warriors you saw in the chambers that led down into this area, have no faces. Instead where you see are an empty void triangular like the large seal, but vacuous.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But matches the same shape?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They didn't Man-E-Faces around? I'm misremembering that? Maybe I just really like Man-E-Faces.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All righty, that ends your turn? All right, it is now their turn. So the one that you just blasted back, as it skids to a halt, almost slams against the wall, it looks over at you across the way and then looks around and surveys the room quickly with its strange triangular vapid lack-of-a-face. Glances up and sees Vex'ahlia on the broom above. Goes into a full leap to push with its feet off the wall and attempt to grab towards you in the middle of the air.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Percy's turned into Rambo.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So the second one you watch as one of its armored shoulder plates dents inward from the impact, and there's a small pierced hole in the center where it seems to have blasted through its armor.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And last shot. I'm going to try and push him ten feet back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Should have done damage. There's no damage on a push shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But he got pushed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But he got pushed ten feet back. And hey, I get a grit point back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah man, when we got pushed in the playground, that got in your head.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So he's got to move ten feet before he can pick up his sword.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And that's everything.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You're in melee, too, so the reduce his ability doesn't really affect you since you're right up against him. How much was that damage total?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Okay, cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So six plus eight. It's 14 plus your strength bonus, which is I believe eight, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, not 26, it's 14 plus eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Sure. So with that, first you knock it prone onto the ground, tripping out from under itself as you sweep across its legs, you watch as one of the pauldrons that's built into its leg splinters off, and you can see the inner mechanisms of the construct's leg. What do you want to do for your second attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I want to hit it again! Reckless, great weapon master. Thank god for that. Seven. Shit, that might not be so good. 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 20 just barely hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it hits. Okay. One, seven, 17! Oh, 17 plus ten, so 27.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. So you walk on over, and it's a small furnace built in there with extremely hot coals, and it seems to be an influx of perpetual heat, but there's a large bellows next to it that you can use to try and increase the heat there for a temporary, short time, and you once again, strangely, you look over to it and you know exactly how this works, like you've always worked with it before. So the flames that were a burning orange-red, extremely hot, begin to flare into bright yellow and white in places. And the heat emanating from it is enough that it causes a lot of you to get uncomfortable in the presence and you have to take a step back, Grog enduring it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sounds like a plan. Can I go over and archaically remove the other two noggins?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: May I assist by holding the bodies with Bigby's Hand while you pull the heads?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, actually. Make a strength check with advantage, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so with Bigby's Hand wrapping around the body, clutching it like an action figure, you very easily (crack) pop the head off, and you now have two disembodied heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: One more. Do you want to help me with this one, too? Yeah! What's wrong with your voice? 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. (groaning) It takes a little while, and it pulls off, but it's mildly deformed from being pulled off. It seems like the hole in the face is intact. It took so hard a try.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We got the ashtrays.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That'll do. Let's try this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. We head over to the smelting apparati.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 24. So in setting up preparation, you take each one of the heads, and to fill each one of their-- I want to say concave, but it's an interior pyramid space. Convex is outward. It will be about 100 platinum pieces or so to fill each face void. So you take the platinum, you melt it down into the smelter, get it to where it's in the gripped, tong-held metallic reservoir, until it eventually melts down. You then pour it into each of the heads, so 300 platinum utilized to do this. It fills to the very edge. Some of it spills over, but you can easily snip that off. As you wait for it to cool, which you can probably help with, actually, as there is no basin for quenching the metal at the moment, so the steam (whoosh) rises up all around, and you turn the heads over, and each one (sliding sound) leaves these heavy metallic pyramid pieces that are smooth and perfect on three of the sides, and one of them appears to be almost like a broken crystal on the inside. It's a shattered, messed-up section.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm still a fire hydrant. Keyleth is on fire marshal duty. I do some misting, like at Six Flags to cool off Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You can't just run through you, like Universal City Walk or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Mainly just to make Vex sexy. That's really all I'm going for. I turned into an elemental. I've got to do something with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a check with your blacksmithing tools, which is your proficiency modifier, and we'll say for this, because it is more of a dextrous use of this skill, add your dexterity modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 24.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. You drop it in the coals. You wait about five minutes or so, and you can see a faint bit of heated glow slowly heating up, but these coals are not smelter ready.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I drop it in the coals.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, the three pieces come apart as soon as you pull it from the section, so you have the three different pieces right there in your arms.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So when three pieces go together the part that goes towards the wall--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's another point. It's like a four-sided pyramid.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, it is a pyramid, so the whole pyramid goes in the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's a flat seal on the outside.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think this needs to be gold, dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Why would it be gold?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, the outside is gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's true.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe the platinum is only for the trammels, not the key.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We can try it. We have gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Finish my stupid idea, and then we'll move onto the next stupid one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Good call.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Has the platinum pyramid started to heat up yet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're holding it in your arms.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I drop it in the coals.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, so about a hundred gold pieces per head. So 300 gold pieces removed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like that makes it special.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Bring on the Night King.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can give it a shot, can't we?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Melt them down into each of the three.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you make their dreams come true and rip their groins off?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Melt their body into their face and make triangles out of the metal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so because you rolled a very high check, I'll let you know, that generally heating up a metal to the point in which it's liquid and then pouring it into the same metal is going to mess up the mold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a terrible idea. Let's try gold. I would have felt very foolish.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You guys are so smart about this stuff, then we should do gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It comes, it comes in waves. It's like a new awakening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll try the gold.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, it's a hundred gold pieces per face. So it's 300 gold pieces total. So 300 gold taken off, total. You smelt it down, same process, and then place within each of the three molds, wait for it to cool and then you remove the three key pieces of the solid gold. They all fit together just as the platinum pieces did.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Bring on the Night King.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can give it a shot, can't we?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Melt them down into each of the three.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you make their dreams come true and rip their groins off?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Melt their body into their face and make triangles out of the metal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so because you rolled a very high check, I'll let you know, that generally heating up a metal to the point in which it's liquid and then pouring it into the same metal is going to mess up the mold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's a terrible idea. Let's try gold. I would have felt very foolish.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You guys are so smart about this stuff, then we should do gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It comes, it comes in waves. It's like a new awakening.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll try the gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so about a hundred gold pieces per head. So 300 gold pieces removed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, how come it was 300? Oh, it's not the same worth, it's the coin.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: As the door eventually comes to a stop maybe a foot before it reaches the ceiling, black smoke pours in from the other chamber. You watch as it immediately fills the ceiling and then begins to dissipate up the stairway and the hallway above you where you guys originally descended from. You see flashes of sparks and embers through these clouds of black smoke and soot within the chamber. It's obscuring most of your view within the inside. And that heavy pounding, that (pounding) is much louder now. You can sense that it is actually the source of that rhythmic beat, that metal-on-metal clang you have been feeling since you first came into this series of chambers. You can see small streams of glowing orange molten rock within the chamber, which is slightly down and before you. Looks like two small ten-foot-wide rivers of molten rock, metal-- you can't quite tell from here, but it's glowing orange and red, and they both convene and go dark in the center where it looks like they are being covered or obscured by something that you can't quite make out at this distance.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The wall immediately shudders and you see a layer of dust and soot, (falling sand) off of it. as it falls to rest onto the ground and you see the wall slowly rise up. (grinding gears)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait. I want to prep something. Hide!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so who's hiding?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, stealth check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, and I'm hiding behind the pillar that I'm next to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you hide behind there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, face death with me!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is bullshit. I'm going to stand there, hands on hips.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll hug the wall closest to the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's just going to reveal another stairway, come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be another door.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys see National Treasure?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, I never saw National Treasure.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, it's so good.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well we'll make an evening of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's Nick Cage at his most mediocre.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: St. Nicholas.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's been maybe ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And when I got in there, I didn't get close enough to see if there was any good hiding spots beyond him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24. There are corners to the chamber. As you fly up and glance you can see two more small equal-sized pits of coals, behind him on either side, and you do glance, two 20-foot-wide domed machines that you see the flame and the billowing smoke are being pushed out of. It's a weird engine-like structure with two of them behind it, that you can see the flames. (hammering) And that's where the sparks are shooting out of each time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do the talking thing, I'm going to go back in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Before we start, how long has it been since we entered this chamber?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, with all of the smelting, put together I'd say it's probably been close to an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 24. There are corners to the chamber. As you fly up and glance you can see two more small equal-sized pits of coals, behind him on either side, and you do glance, two 20-foot-wide domed machines that you see the flame and the billowing smoke are being pushed out of. It's a weird engine-like structure with two of them behind it, that you can see the flames. (hammering) And that's where the sparks are shooting out of each time.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do the talking thing, I'm going to go back in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Before we start, how long has it been since we entered this chamber?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's been maybe ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Entered into the volcano.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, into the volcano?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, entered into the first forge room. I'm trying to find out if Freedom of Movement is still on.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: In that room? Since you entered that chamber it's been about an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, with all of the smelting, put together I'd say it's probably been close to an hour.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I only have one condition effect on him? Or can I stack them up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can have as many as you put on him. If they're not concentration, you can stack as many as you want.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Freedom of Movement is not. I'm going to cast Freedom of Movement on you again, and then I think Enhance Ability is, though, so I'm going to use my concentration to give you Cat's Grace, right? You were using dexterity for the smelting?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, on that one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it's would be dex or strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For most blacksmithing, you gather that it will be dex or strength.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well, strength is way better than dex.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Then I'll give you Cat's Grace. You have advantage on dex checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And DM. How long were we in this room?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: No, it's gone now. It has been more time-- the process of smelting and then re-smelting and figuring out and adjusting everything, it has taken over an hour, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We ask permission to use the anvil.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tell him, nod yes. Once for yes and shake his head no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How about this? I'm not afraid. If he takes offense, I'll take it better than most.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's fair.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So do you ascend the stairs?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I am in the front now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog has now moved to the front. All right. And you take your first couple steps onto the stairs. As you do, the large stone entity spins around and steps into the smoke that obscures its shoulders--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Cure Wounds on myself one more time, while this is happening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to down a potion. And then a quick question, too. Hunter's Mark has a duration of an hour, but since that last battle lapsed, am I then not allowed to slide it to this guy?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay. So you head up the stairs. The water elemental swarms around the side. You see wherever it moves forward there's steam pouring off from the heat of the ground and the surrounding metal and stone. As it comes up the steps, more and more steam (sizzling) emerging off the back of its body, it comes to the top and it's now next to Grog. You send it towards the anvil?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What would happen if we put that machine out?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, it's not like you can step up to the anvil before the metal's hot anyway, right? So maybe we're stepping up to the anvil too soon. Maybe you have to heat the metal first?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think that it feels like a guardian. What if we put the water elemental in the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I was just going to say. I'm going to come into the room a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you step in. Most of you are at the base of the stairs. Grog is at the top of the stairs. Scanlan stepped up behind him to look at the runes on the blade. That's where you currently reside.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is his eyesight still trained on Grog?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to send my water elemental forward and see if it attracts its attention, since it's not a mortal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Where do you send it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Towards the anvil.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, I'll give you advantage if you're going for the chain, then, as you're swinging across it. Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is currently dangling off the side, along with other series of tools: tongs and other smaller blacksmithing accoutrements.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to run in that direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Five, ten, 15, 20. Another step, and you're starting to hit the molten metal and rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Molten metal and rock? I can't jump that, can I?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can try, yeah. Make an athletics check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not an acrobatics check, I take it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not for the leap.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But there are chains that I can reach there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you're leaping towards the chains, you can attempt to grab it, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I'm going to attempt to grab the hammer.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Are you using it to swing, or are you just trying to grab and hold on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If it's available for a swing, I'll try for a swing.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, that ends your turn. It's now its turn. It gets its legendary actions back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I would like to cast Vow of Enmity on this dick, which will put me at regular, because I would get advantage versus the disadvantage of blindness, so now I'm at regular.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it a visual spell?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's what I'm checking right now.

preceding_turns.text: Oh, wow. I've got it here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, spellcasting's a bitch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Vow of Enmity. Creature you can see within ten feet of you. You cannot currently see it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit, y'all. Fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Instead, I'll use my bonus action to cast Hunter's Mark.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You need--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Visual on that as well? Okay, got it, never mind. It's not his turn yet, wow. Okay, I'm going to use my bonus action to disengage. I can move five, ten, 15, 20, 25, 30. And I'm going to get the fuck out of here. Five, ten, 15, 20, 25, 30, there. And that's it, I'm fucking blind and I ran because I can't see shit. Done.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That's 15 minutes if it's a straight multiple people helping circumstance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to fly next to him and I'm going to touch him and I'm going to cast Lesser Restoration on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You use your action to cast Lesser Restoration. So the Lesser Restoration affects--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Heals blindness and deafness.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good, go to the 250 hit point guy. Good call.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He needs to be able to fucking see so he can smith while we're trying to distract this fucker.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The blindness fades as she touches you. Your vision comes back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Oh, right, then I held my action for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's the thing, he was holding.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Should I try and smith?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Here's the question. I should know this how quickly can these things be made?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, to be honest, the process of each trammel is going to be a 15-minute process. You can't hyper-smith in the middle of battle. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well. Okay. Do I have any more movement left?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 18, not enough. The darkness takes over again in your eyes. It's still there in front of you, you know where it is, but your vision is taken from you. That is going to end that. It's now your turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you run around this way.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and that's two crits, which means I get two grits back. I'm like (grunts) that way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is as far as you can get. If you want to go that way, you'll have to go around in lava, so you have to go around. That's as far as you can get there. That ends your turn, Percival. All right, at the end of your turn it's going to use its third and final legendary action to hack down at you because you're up next.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Bring it. I have no fear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so that is a 25.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Damn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Uncanny Dodge. Halve it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 33 points of slashing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, halved.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so it'll be 16, and I want you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Right after you were healed.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is just what you're going to be doing.

preceding_turns.text: That's why I went there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That gets me to 18.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Okay, so Vax is going to hold that. It's now his turn. Let's see if he gets the blade storm back. Does! He does get the blade storm back. So he's going to leap and land up here in the center. Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I hate holding my turn, because I don't understand it. If I hold my turn, I can only attack when it gets back to me, right?

preceding_turns.text: Depends on whatever action you decide to hold.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I hold my turn to cast Vow of Enmity until I can see again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can do that if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to hold my turn until I can fucking see to cast Vow of Enmity and attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you're expecting somebody else in your party to come heal you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do fuck all without it. Yes. That's what I'm doing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You can move. You have a bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, bonus action is Vow of Enmity.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This guy can get anywhere. He has shown us that he can get anywhere on this map. There's no point going anywhere. No, I'm going to stay put. That's what I'm doing. I've already called it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I will say, the minute you hit him and the vision comes back, I'll allow you to do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. For 30 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (crash) It takes the hit, it lands. Go ahead and make your attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I had him flanked with Grog, right, because he was right between the two of us? So down to regular attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good. That hits. That's 18 plus a lot. Plus 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is 11, plus psychic damage is 13, plus these fuckers. (counting) 35.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, takes 35 damage, and the blindness fades.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, maybe because I cut a bit?

preceding_turns.text: It seems less concentration. You get the sense that the blindness lasts until you hit it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I see now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can now see.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So now I can do my held turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I within ten feet? I'll move forward a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you held your action, not your turn. There's a difference.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, but he's near--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At the end of that turn, it's going to use its second legendary action to attack Vax this time. And since you're blind, it has advantage. That is a 29 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 11d6, yes. Okay. That's only 42.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's pretty decent, though. 42 points of lightning damage as you blast it from behind. (crackling) The energy hits the back and arcs through its weapon and its blade, and you can see steam rising up around where its fingers grasp the handle. The leather kilt that hangs at its sides is singed and burned from the impact. Well done. Do you want to move or stay where you are?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How far am I from the thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're about ten, 12 feet from it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will not move.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but you're not blind anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was never blind.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right. You avoided it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But me hitting it doesn't un-blind someone else, does it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, shit. Okay, I'll Healing Word myself again, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is it? 2d4 plus six.

payload.speaker: MATT

The forge guardian does not regain his blade storm. He's going to make two melee attacks against you, Grog, since you've given him the option. Actually, he's going to go ahead and leap a little bit, to land here, not enough to give you an attack of opportunity. It's going to make one strike at you, Grog, and another kick attack at Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I can't whirl around it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to go around it, you can go (counting).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That'll do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, there you go. All right, that ends Percival's turn. Death saving throw, with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Good, natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're fine. Actually, you stabilize. You're fine. End of your turn. It's now the forge guardian's turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is he blind? Is he still blind?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, he's not conscious, and currently you are still blind, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM

preceding_turns.text: Oh, but you're still unconscious.

preceding_turns.text: No, you regain one hit point if you roll a 20! You're right!

payload.speaker: MATT

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.text: I will say at this point, because the elemental took quite a bit of damage, that you guys quickly dispatch it. I don't want to have to worry about you guys killing a blind elemental. It's fine. No longer blind, but still. (splat) It's gone.

preceding_turns.text: I'm back to 144.

preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wow. And so many things don't work anymore. Okay. Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's wrong now?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, my Hex is burned, my Spider Climb's burned, Diplomacy is a long rest before that goes again.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. You can lift him up. (grunts) It takes you a minute and it's a slow pull. You feel the veins bulging on your blue-skinned forehead. (grunts)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Put that one away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I rolled a 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You two tug on those chains, and they are not moving.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can the guardian do it? Hey, you that was attacking us. Can you get those chains?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a persuasion check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Really? Yeah, it wasn't a very persuasive thing to say. 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14? It makes no motion, change, nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Shorthalt, you got any Bigby's left in you?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could do one if we really need it. What's wrong with Grog? He can't do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's too high.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He could do one. We could get him up there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is the end of the chain able to where I can pull to at least make it reach Grog or no?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you don't have the strength to pull it down, not with that strength check, unfortunately.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can you Bigby one and maybe Vex can slowly pull Grog up to that thing on your broom?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or she could probably lift Grog up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I fly Grog up?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Short rest, so he has his inspiration back.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait. Is this an ability check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm exhausted.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Bigby isn't, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bigby isn't. It's a check for the spell, not for you. So together you both eventually bring the chains to the bottom and you find one of the number of hooks on the floor area where you can wrap it around to hold it in place. It's tenuous but it's holding. And so the large metal door on the opposite side is currently now held up about 13 feet up. It's only partway up right now but that's all you need at the moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can Grog and them let go? Is it going to slam shut?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They found large rings and hooks to hook them onto.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We hurry to the other room.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We hurry to the other room. If we can get any inspiration, too, before we start this process.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: There's no inspiration-- Oh, no, he rested. Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. So. It takes you a good 20 minutes or so, 30 minutes or so per ingot to get all the impurities out, to heat it and to scoop it out. Eventually gets so you can form three bars of pure platinum to the level that you know the requirements of the trammel are. You look around. You don't see any areas here to cool the metal. You didn't get a good look at the other chamber necessarily to see if there was something for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Make sure you use some of those pyramids we made, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, so we don't waste that platinum that we melted into triangles.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So Grog, I need you to go ahead and make a blacksmithing tool check. This is with proficiency bonus. It should be dexterity for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: At which you have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which I have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. So you'd roll twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: 1,500 per trammel? Of platinum. Okay. We're fine. Yeah. Can you get your calculator out? Never mind. I can do this it myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, figure out what dex plus proficiency. Whatever your dex plus prof is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, advantage. Right. I got it. 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, do you want me to inspire you or anything? Do you all need anything?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: How long does inspiration last for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Up to ten minutes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's wait until the final--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 19's fine. The hammering isn't too hard. The different things have different difficulties, and so the folding isn't too bad. So with that, you guys take the dust and you scatter it across the metal and then hammer and fold, hammer and fold and take more and scatter it across the metal as it's still heated. Hammer and fold, then go and take it off to the side to two of the coal areas, and you watch as the furnaces burn and heat the metal up again. You bring it back up to the steps and hammer and fold, hammer and fold with more of it until eventually, you've managed to hammer in over the next 20 or so minutes, both of you sweating, feeling a little bit of stiffness and soreness in your arms from this process, but you've been far worse.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do we fold this into one of the ingots? One at a time?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One at a time.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So with you holding the tongs and helping him, you take the hammer. I need you to make a blacksmithing tool check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: With advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is with strength, on this one. This is hammering the metal and folding it into the metal.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That is a 19.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: (laughs) We'll get to you shortly. So as you begin to hammer it out, it's getting a little fragile at some points. I'll let you make one more check so you don't ruin one of the trammels.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cat's Grace.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Then I'll keep that. And then what was the Guidance? Do I have Guidance any more?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you can't have both.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want advantage or do you want that extra d4?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So he can still add one d4 on this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pick one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a 15 with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a 15?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shall I inspire him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you have to inspire him before he makes the check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Because it's my dexterity modifier plus my proficiency bonus, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I help with this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are helping with this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh god. Okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 29. So this time, seeing where the imperfections were in the hammering you initially did and curving and bringing fragility to one of the trammels, you double back, heat up, and correct the mistake. Over the next ten minutes or so, you both carefully work to bring each to a razor point at the end of these large platinum javelins now. They're thicker on one side and come to an impossible point at the other. You have three of these base trammels now complete.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So he can still add one d4 on this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Pick one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a 15 with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a 15?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shall I inspire him?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you have to inspire him before he makes the check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Because it's my dexterity modifier plus my proficiency bonus, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Can I help with this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are helping with this.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh god. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) We'll get to you shortly. So as you begin to hammer it out, it's getting a little fragile at some points. I'll let you make one more check so you don't ruin one of the trammels.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Advantage, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Advantage and inspiration.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Yeah, I'll inspire him again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He needs as much as you can give him, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I will give him every inch of myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So one? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: One by one by one, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: My god. That's better. Okay. That's a 24. Should I use the inspiration?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you should.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So with that, you, one by one, slowly using the clamp, twist, heat it up, grab, clamp, twist, hammer, twist and continue this process for each trammel as everyone looks on with bated breath. The deafening sound of the engine-like contraptions fill the space like a heartbeat. Their rhythm gets into your muscles and the aches begin to fade as you focus on the hammers in unison with the (slamming). Becomes this very primal forging-of-the-world vision to see Grog atop this anvil for over an hour at this point now, sweating and hammering away at these trammels. A vision of the Allhammer once, long ago, forging weapons of old, long-forgotten and lost, now Grog sits here, forging the means of sealing one of the biggest threats to the Prime Material Plane by himself. As you finish twisting the final trammel, you pull it up (sizzling), quenching them in the water that you left behind. And as you pull up, you can see as the steam rises, the three twisted javelins of pure platinum ready for the final scrolling.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Now we got to twist them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, we got to put the runes in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So now you have to twist them. This is where you bring up the leg vice. So you go ahead and you clamp it in there. This is without your help. This is now you taking and heating the metal and twisting it as you go, so make another blacksmithing check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can guide you. I can do nothing else.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is a dexterity-based.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it's dexterity still? Then keep the advantage. You have advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sobbing) I'm tired of this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does he have any more inspiration?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. I can inspire him.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, keep inspiring.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He already rolled.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But he hasn't announced it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He already rolled.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's a 26. It's okay.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: 31. (skittering, clanging) After about five minutes or so, you finish and grab one of the trammels and (clang) onto the ground. Begin on the other. (skittering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it a dex check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's what you gave to Grog earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Then I will give you Cat's Grace at third level because my 2nd-level spells are tapped. And so are now my 3rd-level spells. Nothing more.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: If you have any inspiration, I'll also take it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, sure. I'll give you some. I will sing to you. I will sing: (singing) bang bang, Percy's ball-peen hammer goes down, upon the ground! Bang bang, Percy's ball-peen hammer makes a really, really big sound. (vocalizing)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The actual heat from the Core Anvil is enough that when you hold the trammel against it, it gives it just enough of a malleable edge for you to go ahead and chisel through it without issue. As you're going, it's three checks: one for each trammel. So the first one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's without inspiration. That's 31.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So are you going to long rest and then Plane Shift or Plane Shift and then long rest wherever you land?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So GenCon we're going to start with trying to get out of an active volcano?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I think we'll assume that we're going to take a mansion rest and we'll come out of a mansion rest. Can we assume that's going to be it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to take that point now, we'll say with the end of this episode you guys take a mansion rest? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Or are you tapped out? Do you have any spells left, Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I saved one level eight spell for such a thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So we head into the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I technically have one 7th-level spell, so if we want to go into the mansion and then I can Plane Shift us home, we can do that. Or wherever we want.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: So we can Plane Shift, mansion wherever we need.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And if we go into the mansion, the first purple servant that hands me a salad, I behead unless it's the GoFiBePo.
